headline: Leidos (LDOS) Stock May Be Undervalued After Health IT Contract Uncertainty
summary: Leidos Holdings stock has fallen sharply year to date, yet the company still screens as cheap on several valuation checks, which puts the recent sell off at odds with the current pricing signals. Year to date, Leidos Holdings is down 43.8%, which means the market has rapidly reset expectations after a long period of stronger multi year returns. On the one hand, new federal technology wins and AI focused partnerships can support longer term earnings power, while the health IT contract...

headline: Leidos (LDOS) Ties Up With Modern Data To Tackle Federal AI Data Gaps
summary: Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) announced a new partnership with The Modern Data Company focused on federal AI and analytics. The collaboration centers on using Modern Data’s DataOS to connect fragmented government data across systems. The move is part of Leidos’ NorthStar 2030 strategy to expand its digital modernization offerings for federal agencies. Leidos Holdings enters this partnership with The Modern Data Company at a time when the stock is trading around $103.07, with a mixed return...
